name: startups
description: 70 skills spanning the full venture-building workflow — venture chassis (scaffolding, status, phase routing, vision, hypotheses, pivot log, handoff), customer discovery, Strategyzer value-proposition & business-model canvases, competitor analysis, customer relationships & channels, prototyping, MVP planning + engineering bridge (architecture, ADRs, API, Supabase RLS, Cloudflare/Vercel deploy, analytics), and Lean-Startup experimentation. Composes on top of the @web-lifter/claude-memex venture profile.
